title: Agent Config Hardening — async save, locale-safe parsing, loading state
consumer_purpose: Eliminate toast-timing race, locale-sensitive parseFloat bug, double-save on rapid click, missing loading UI, and delete confirmation gap in agent config dialogs
claim_atoms: parseFloat replaced with locale-safe Number(value.replace(',','.')) for temperature/topP
isSaving signal prevents concurrent save invocation
Save button disabled + spinner shown during async save
Error in onSave is caught and logged, isSaving always resets
Delete confirmation dialog exists before handleConfirmDelete executes
content: ## Plan: Agent Config Hardening (Lane 5) ### Root Causes | Finding | Root Cause | Confidence | |---------|-----------|------------| | AGENT-H-001 | handleSave() calls props.onSave() without await — dialog closes before async callback resolves | High | | AGENT-H-002 | Number.parseFloat("0,5") returns NaN for comma-decimal locales | High | | AGENT-H-003 | No guard against concurrent handleSave() invocations | High | | AGENT-H-004 | No isSaving signal → save button never disabled during async | High | | AGENT-H-005 | **Already fixed** in commit 9e953e7be (inline confirm/cancel UI in DialogManageAgents) | N/A | ### Files to change - `packages/app/src/components/dialog-edit-agent.tsx` — fixes H-001 through H-004 - `packages/app/src/components/dialog-manage-agents.tsx` — **no changes needed** (H-005 already done) ### Changes #### Fix A: dialog-edit-agent.tsx — all 4 remaining bugs in one file **A1 — Change Props.onSave type (line 14)** ```ts // before onSave: (agent: AgentDef) => void // after onSave: (agent: AgentDef) => void | Promise ``` Reason: Enables handleSave to await the returned promise without TS error. **A2 — Add Spinner import (line 6)** ```ts // before import { createMemo, createSignal, For, Show } from "solid-js" // after import { createMemo, createSignal, For, Show } from "solid-js" import { Spinner } from "@opencode-ai/ui/spinner" ``` Reason: Loading indicator component for save button (AGENT-H-004). **A3 — Add isSaving signal (after line 38)** — insertion after `const [color, setColor] = ...` ```ts const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = createSignal(false) ``` Reason: Guard against double-save + toggle loading UI (AGENT-H-003, H-004). **A4 — Rewrite handleSave (lines 59-73)** Fixes H-001 (await onSave), H-002 (locale-safe parse), H-003 (isSaving guard), H-001 (error handled): ```ts // before const handleSave = () => { const id = props.agent?.id ?? crypto.randomUUID() const temp = temperature() !== "" ? Math.min(2, Math.max(0, Number.parseFloat(temperature()))) : undefined const tp = topP() !== "" ? Math.min(1, Math.max(0, Number.parseFloat(topP()))) : undefined props.onSave({ id, name: name(), prompt: prompt(), description: description() || undefined, model: model() || undefined, variant: variant() || undefined, temperature: temp !== undefined && !Number.isNaN(temp) ? temp : undefined, top_p: tp !== undefined && !Number.isNaN(tp) ? tp : undefined, color: color() || undefined, }) dialog.close() } // after const handleSave = async () => { if (isSaving()) return setIsSaving(true) try { const id = props.agent?.id ?? crypto.randomUUID() const temp = temperature() !== "" ? Math.min(2, Math.max(0, Number(temperature().replace(",", ".")))) : undefined const tp = topP() !== "" ? Math.min(1, Math.max(0, Number(topP().replace(",", ".")))) : undefined await props.onSave({ id, name: name(), prompt: prompt(), description: description() || undefined, model: model() || undefined, variant: variant() || undefined, temperature: temp !== undefined && !Number.isNaN(temp) ? temp : undefined, top_p: tp !== undefined && !Number.isNaN(tp) ? tp : undefined, color: color() || undefined, }) dialog.close() } catch (err) { console.error("Failed to save agent:", err) } finally { setIsSaving(false) } } ``` **A5 — Update save button with disabled+loading state (lines 177-179)** ```tsx // before // after ``` #### Fix B: dialog-manage-agents.tsx — No changes needed AGENT-H-005 was already addressed in commit 9e953e7be: - `handleDeleteAgent` sets `confirmDelete` signal - Inline confirmation UI with "dialog.agents.delete.confirm" label + Delete/Cancel buttons - `handleConfirmDelete` awaits `saveCustomAgents` then shows toast after IPC resolves ### Impact Assessment | File | Lines Changed | What Could Break | |------|--------------|------------------| | dialog-edit-agent.tsx | +4 added, ~15 modified | None — void|Promise accepts all existing callers; catch block prevents unhandled rejections; finally always resets isSaving | ### Risks 1. **Unhandled rejection if onSave throws**: ✅ Mitigated by `catch (err) { console.error(...) }` — matches existing `saveCustomAgents` error pattern. 2. **isSaving never resets on error**: ✅ Mitigated by `finally { setIsSaving(false) }` — runs regardless of try/catch outcome. 3. **Spinner import breaks build**: ✅ `@opencode-ai/ui/spinner` is used in 6 other files — proven import path. 4. **i18n "common.saving" missing**: Using hardcoded "Saving..." — transient UI state, not a translatable label. 5. **Props.onSave type incompatibility**: ✅ `void | Promise` is a widening union — all `() => void` callbacks are assignable. 6. **Rapid-click race to async body**: ✅ `if (isSaving()) return` guard at top — second click returns before `setIsSaving(true)`. ### Validation 1. `bun typecheck` in `packages/app` — must pass with no new TS errors 2. `bun test` in `packages/app` — run existing test suite for regressions 3. Manual: open manage agents → edit agent → enter "0,7" temperature → save → verify parsed as 0.7 4. Manual: rapid-click save button → verify single IPC call 5. Manual: save button shows Spinner + "Saving..." during async write 6. Manual: toast appears only after save/delete completes 7. Manual: delete confirmation flow still works (edit/delete/cancel) ### Apply Order 1. A1 (Props type) + A2 (Spinner import) + A3 (isSaving signal) — declarations only, no behavior change 2. A4 (handleSave rewrite) — behavioral change, tested via manual steps 3-4 3. A5 (button JSX) — visual change, tested via manual step 5 ### Rollback Revert all changes to `dialog-edit-agent.tsx` via `git checkout dev -- packages/app/src/components/dialog-edit-agent.tsx`
revision_notes: Added catch block for unhandled rejection risk; added 6th claim atom for error handling; expanded risk mitigation descriptions
